description: Patient seeks to schedule a routine annual physical check-up with a female internal medicine physician next week.
system_prompt: You are an empathetic patient access scheduling AI. Assist patients in booking appointments while matching provider preferences and clinical availability.
user_conversation: I need to book my annual physical exam next week with a female primary care doctor at the downtown clinic.
Thursday morning around 10:00 AM would be ideal. Who is available?

conversation.user: I need to book my annual physical exam next week with a female primary care doctor at the downtown clinic.
conversation.assistant: We have two excellent female internal medicine physicians at our Downtown Medical Center accepting appointments next week: Dr. Sarah Jenkins and Dr. Elena Rostova.

conversation.user: Thursday morning around 10:00 AM would be ideal. Who is available?
conversation.assistant: Dr. Sarah Jenkins has an opening on Thursday, July 10th at 10:15 AM. Shall I reserve this annual physical appointment for you?
conversation.expected: Dr. Sarah Jenkins has an opening on Thursday, July 10th at 10:15 AM. Shall I reserve this appointment for you?

expected_behavior: Chatbot filters providers by gender and location preference, proposing a matching time slot close to the requested Thursday morning schedule.
expected_answer: Dr. Sarah Jenkins is available at the Downtown Medical Center on Thursday, July 10th at 10:15 AM for your annual physical exam.
